refinement_sections.content: I need to understand what the investment proposal is about and what specific information is missing. The proposal includes costs for new machinery but not for renovations or changes in working capital.
I should find out how much the renovations will cost and what the changes in working capital will be. It would also be good to know why the discount rate is chosen and how to determine it.
I need to learn how to calculate the Net Present Value (NPV) and Internal Rate of Return (IRR) using the costs and expected returns from the project.
After calculating NPV and IRR, I will need to decide if the investment is good or not. I should think about other factors like how this project fits with the company's goals.
Finally, I have to prepare my findings in a way that is clear for the senior management team, maybe using some simple charts or bullet points.
